steps.t: Ashâmi told you she and Raphûz intend to fight alongside one another against whatever the great evil stirring in Shagâna proves to be. She hopes you w…
Your friends and their things are gone from the home. There is a note bearing your name left behind. You should collect and read the note you found.
Though the letter did not say directly Ashâmi and Raphûz went on to Urash Dâr, all you know of the pair and your journeys lead to their taking the fig…
